evidence: The word 'airy' strongly resonates with physical material (ontological.material 9) and direct sensory perception (epistemological.perception 8). It operates at an individual scale (scale.individual 5) and has functional value (value_generation.functional 6). Its superficial resonance (resonance.superficial 6) and predictability (lawfulness.predictable 5) align with its lightweight property. Lower scores reflect its lack of deeper existential or relational connections.

Buoyant strongly resonates with physical material (ontological.material), individual scale, and functional utility. It connects to perception (direct sensing of lightness) and essential resonance (core essence of lightness). Scores drop to 0 for most slots due to its straightforward, non-abstract nature tied to physical weight.

Scores peak at scale.individual (10), ontological.material (10), and resonance.essential (10), reflecting the word's core meaning of lightweight physicality. High epistemological scores (perception/experience) highlight sensory embodiment. Aesthetic value (10) captures the graceful connotation of floaty things. Lower scores reflect minimal temporal, interconnection, and symmetry dynamics in this context.

The word 'light' (PRP) strongly resonates with physical properties (ontological.material/semantic), individual objects (scale.individual), direct sensory experience (epistemological), and its inherent, predictable nature (lawfulness.predictable). These aspects underpin its functional utility (value_generation.functional) and essential core (resonance.essential).

Light-duty strongly resonates with material existence (ontological.material 10) and practical utility (value_generation.functional 10). It is perceived directly (epistemological.perception 10) and identified categorically (epistemological.identification 10). Its persistence (temporal.continuation 2) and predictability (lawfulness.predictable 10) reflect its foundational, enduring nature.

The word resonates strongly with material existence (physical property), essential essence of lightness, functional utility, and predictable physics. Moderate connections exist through sensory perception, relational buoyancy effects, and transformative/generative possibilities like enabling flight.

Lightness strongly resonates with material existence (ontological.material) and functional utility (value_generation.functional). It connects to perception (epistemological.perception) and identification (epistemological.identification) as a tangible quality. Essential resonance (resonance.essential) reflects its core essence as a physical property. Predictable lawfulness (lawfulness.predictable) aligns with its stable, weight-based definition.

Lightweight strongly resonates with material existence (ontological.material=10) and direct sensory perception (epistemological.perception=10). It emphasizes functional utility (value.functional=10) and core essence (resonance.essential=10). Scores for scale.individual (8) and epistemological.experience (8) reflect its focus on physical objects and embodied understanding. Lower scores reflect its lack of connection to abstract scales, existential resonance, or ethical dimensions.

The highest scores reflect its physical nature (material, perception), practical utility (functional), and individual-scale application. Scores for semantic and identification highlight its conceptual clarity. Lower scores align with its lack of deeper existential or systemic resonance.

Low-density strongly resonates with ontological.material (physical property), ontological.semantic (core to meaning of lightness), epistemological.perception (direct sensory experience of lightness), and resonance.essential (core essence of being light). It also aligns with value_generation.functional (practical utility in lightweight materials) and lawfulness.predictable (follows density-weight relationships).

Unaccented relates to absence of emphasis/stress, resonating with structural patterns (ontological.structural), informational layers (ontological.informational), and superficial resonance. It has functional/aesthetic value in contexts like language or design, and ties to perception/understanding of its role in systems.

Unstressed strongly resonates with material existence (lightness as physical property), sensory perception of ease, and practical utility. It weakly connects to persistence over time, dependency on conditions, and superficial resonance as a surface-level state. Scores are low elsewhere due to its narrow focus on physical lightness.

The word 'weak' in the PRP.light context strongly resonates with physical materiality (ontological.material 7) and functional utility (value_generation.functional 5). It is directly perceived (epistemological.perception 3) and identified (epistemological.identification 5) as a tangible attribute. Its independence (interconnection.independent 3) and predictability (lawfulness.predictable 4) align with its role as a basic physical property. Scores reflect its grounding in sensory experience and practical application.

Weightless strongly resonates with material existence (ontological.material), sensory perception (epistemological.perception), and embodied experience (epistemological.experience). It connects to independent entities (scale.individual) and essential resonance (resonance.essential). Lower scores reflect its lack of temporal permanence or existential depth, and its functional/aesthetic value in contexts like physics or poetry.

Weightlessness strongly resonates with material ontology (physical sensation), essential resonance (core essence of lightness), and stellar scale (space contexts). It connects to perception/experience (embodied feeling), structural patterns (gravity laws), and aesthetic value (beauty of floating). Scores drop where connections are indirect or tied to PRP.heavy's opposite dynamics.
